channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Meta again testing facial recognition software to fight 'celeb bait' scams
item.description: Meta, the parent company of Facebook and Instagram, is testing facial recognition software to combat “celeb bait” scams on its platforms, as well as to allow users to more easily regain access to their accounts.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Kamala Harris is going all in on Snapchat. But Donald Trump is still banned
item.description: Since July, Kamala Harris’s campaign has purchased more than 5,000 Snapchat ads, amounting to an estimated $​​5.3 million. It’s not hard to understand why: Snapchat is a haven for young people.
item.dc:creator: Henry Chandonnet, Fast Company

item.title: Don’t panic. Here’s how to find your photos after iOS 18 update
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson has the details on the iOS 18 Photos app: Revamped layout, customizable collections and easier photo organization.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Musk’s xAI unveils a new API service for Grok models
item.description: Elon Musk-backed generative AI venture, xAI, has unveiled a new API service for its Grok models to allow developers to underpin their applications and agents with xAI’s large language models (LLMs).
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Why Python is the language of choice for AI
item.description: The widespread adoption of AI is creating a paradigm shift in the software engineering world. Python has quickly become the programming language of choice for AI development due to its usability, mature ecosystem, and ability to meet the data-driven needs of AI and machine learning (ML) workflows.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Securing the digital future: How Huawei is tackling cybersecurity in the GCC
item.description: As the GCC countries continue to evolve into global digital hubs, the adoption of technologies such as 5G, AI, and IoT is accelerating rapidly. These advancements offer immense economic growth and innovation potential, but they also introduce new cybersecurity challenges.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Biden administration awards $325 million to Hemlock Semiconductor for Michigan factory
item.description: The Biden administration said Monday that it would provide up to $325 million to Hemlock Semiconductor for a new factory, a move that could help give Democrats a political edge in the swing state of Michigan ahead of election day.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: FTC's rule banning fake online reviews goes into effect
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A federal rule banning fake online reviews is now in effect. The Federal Trade Commission issued the rule in August banning the sale or purchase of online reviews.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: NYC Department of Education builds the pipeline for future cybersecurity professionals
item.description: There’s been a lot of talk over the past few years about a shortage of skilled cybersecurity talent, but from where we sit at the NYC DOE Division of Information and Instructional Technology (DIIT), we see budding security pros all around us.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: TikTok Trend Seeks Out Rejection with "Rejection Therapy" - A Journalistic Analysis
item.description: Exploring the viral TikTok trend of intentionally seeking rejection, its connection to self-help concepts, and expert opinions on its therapeutic value.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Legislation now calling for spacecraft manufacturers to create cybersecurity plan when working with NASA
item.description: The Spacecraft Cybersecurity Act would require NASA to secure a cybersecurity protection. The post Legislation now calling for spacecraft manufacturers to create cybersecurity plan when working with NASA first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Eric White, Federal News Network

item.title: Cuban says Harris campaign rejected live X interview with Musk
item.description: Billionaire investor Mark Cuban said Monday that Vice President Harris’s campaign rejected a live interview on the social platform X with billionaire Elon Musk, who owns the platform.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: How Republicans pushed Silicon Valley social media companies to stop fighting election misinformation
item.description: The shift took place against the backdrop of an intimidation campaign led by Republican state and federal lawmakers aimed at forcing social media companies to platform falsehoods and hate speech and thwarting those working to study or limit the spread of that destabilizing content.
item.dc:creator: CNN.com Wire Service, The Mercury News

item.title: One of the world’s largest book publishers adds AI warnings to its books
item.description: To make generative AI tools (genAI) work as well as possible, tech companies have chosen to train their large language models (LLMs) on large amounts of text, even though doing so could run afoul of copyright laws.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Effectiveness of cybersecurity penetration testing depends on what you penetrate
item.description: "We get to do all kinds of really interesting, often nefarious things. Our job is to think like the bad guys do, and to try and break in," said Rob Olson. The post Effectiveness of cybersecurity penetration testing depends on what you penetrate first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: Biden administration to provide $325 million for new Michigan semiconductor factory
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Biden administration said Monday that it would provide up to $325 million to Hemlock Semiconductor for a new factory, a move that could help give Democrats a political edge in the swing state of Michigan ahead of election day.
item.dc:creator: JOSH BOAK, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Slack researcher discusses the fear, loathing and excitement surrounding AI in the workplace
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Artificial intelligence's recent rise to the forefront of business has left most office workers wondering how often they should use the technology and whether a computer will eventually replace them.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: GoFundMe bets social media can unlock Gen Z giving. Meta partnership, new tools will test that
item.description: “We play a really important role helping people ask for help and give help in the world,” GoFundMe CEO Tim Cadogan said.
item.dc:creator: JAMES POLLARD, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Army aims for speed in new $10B software contract
item.description: Potential bidders have until the end of this week to offer comments on the Army's latest draft request for proposals. 15-20 firms will win spots on the contract The post Army aims for speed in new $10B software contract first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jared Serbu, Federal News Network

item.title: Recycling trucks with AI-powered cameras raise privacy concerns
item.description: The artificial intelligence can detect if there are any improperly recycled items and will log the information accordingly.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Soriano, NewsNation

item.title: Stanford researchers map ‘White-Only’ properties using AI
item.description: Racially restrictive covenants are clauses in property deeds that ban individuals of a particular race from buying a home.
item.dc:creator: Hamza Fahmy, NewsNation

item.title: Augmented reality screens are a feature, not a product
item.description: Apple released a claustrophobic submarine movie for Apple Vision Pro earlier this month, and it gave me a sinking feeling. The movie Submerged was neither augmented reality (AR) nor virtual reality (VR) nor 360-degree video. It was more like 180-degree video.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: AI stagnation: The gap between AI investment and AI adoption
item.description: AI continues to shape cloud strategies, but AI implementation is going slower than most predicted. This is frustrating for technology providers who have made big bets on AI.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Alabama man arrested in SEC social media account hack that led the price of bitcoin to spike
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — An Alabama man was arrested Thursday for his alleged role in the January hack of a U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission social media account that led the price of bitcoin to spike, the Justice Department said. Eric Council Jr.
item.dc:creator: ALANNA DURKIN RICHER, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Gluware expands network automation platform with AI copilots, GitHub integration
item.description: Gluware today announced a series of upcoming features for its network automation platform, designed to streamline network management and reduce downtime across diverse network environments.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Data center provider fakes Tier 4 data center certificate to bag $11M SEC deal
item.description: Deepak Jain, CEO of a Maryland-based IT services firm, has been indicted for fraud and making false statements after allegedly falsifying a Tier 4 data center certification to secure a $10.7 million contract with the US Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC).
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: A10 Networks tackles AI threats with platform updates
item.description: A10 Networks is updating its platforms in a bid to help enterprises deal with increasing risks, including those that might come from AI-driven attacks. The improvements to the network security vendor’s technology span multiple products.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: AI-powered scam targets Gmail users
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
